metadata.title: Mathiter — Your AI Math Tutor for Exam Success
metadata.description: Struggling with math exams? Mathiter's AI tutor helps you master SAT, IGCSE, IB, and A-Level math with personalized practice, game-like learning, and real exam simulations.
metadata.ogTitle: Mathiter — Your AI Math Tutor for Exam Success
metadata.ogDescription: Master SAT, IGCSE, IB & A-Level math with your personal AI tutor. Fun, game-like learning that actually improves your scores.

hero.badge: AI Math Coach for International School Exams
hero.headlineLine1: Find your child's math weak spots
hero.subHeadline: Spending a fortune on private tutoring? For just $24.99/month, Mathiter's AI pinpoints your child's weak topics, generates personalized problems, and explains mistakes with custom videos.

benefits.diagnosis: 10-minute adaptive test for precise skill assessment
benefits.analytics: Real-time parent dashboard to track learning progress
benefits.gamification: RPG-style learning that keeps kids studying on their own

hero.trustNote: Free diagnostic available immediately after sign-up · No credit card required

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Sound Familiar?
problem.subtitle: Three challenges that hold students back — and that we built Mathiter to solve.

retention.title: "I study, but I forget everything."
retention.description: Traditional study methods don't stick. Without engaging practice and smart review, knowledge fades fast. Students lose motivation when studying feels like a chore.

gap.title: "I understand the concept, but I fail the test."
gap.description: There's a big gap between understanding math in class and scoring well on standardized exams like the SAT or IGCSE. Test-taking requires different skills that most courses don't teach.

personalization.title: "I wish someone could just pinpoint exactly what I don't know."
personalization.description: Every student has unique weak spots, but most education treats everyone the same. Without personalized guidance, students waste time on what they already know and miss what they actually need.

features.label: Core Features
features.title: Everything You Need to Raise Your Score
features.subtitle: Six powerful tools that work together to help you study smarter, not harder.

coach.title: Smart Questioning That Finds Your Weak Spots
coach.description: Instead of just giving you answers, our AI asks guiding questions that help you discover mistakes on your own. It detects hidden gaps in your understanding and tracks them for focused review.

videos.title: Personalized Explanation Videos
videos.description: When you struggle with a concept, the AI creates a short video explanation tailored to your exact mistake. Each video targets the specific topic you need help with — not a generic lecture.

analytics.title: AI That Understands How You Learn
analytics.description: Our system analyzes your learning patterns from multiple angles — identifying strengths, predicting scores, planning your study path, and recommending exactly what to practice next.

gamification.title: RPG-Style Learning That Keeps You Coming Back
gamification.description: Earn XP, customize your avatar, care for virtual pets, and climb seasonal rankings. Daily study sessions grow your character — making math practice feel like your favorite game.

examPractice.title: Real Exam Simulations
examPractice.description: Practice under the exact conditions of your target exam — including the Digital SAT's adaptive format, IGCSE, IB, and more. Get auto-graded results with detailed analysis of where to improve.

dashboard.title: Parent & Teacher Insights
dashboard.description: Parents can track study habits, progress, and weak areas in real time. Teachers get automatic grading, reports, and assignment tools — saving hours of manual work every week.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Your Learning Journey in 5 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: A smart cycle that keeps adapting to your progress and gets you closer to your target score with every session.

diagnose.title: Diagnose
diagnose.subtitle: Smart Assessment
diagnose.description: Take a quick adaptive test that figures out exactly where you stand. Questions adjust to your level in real time, so you get an accurate picture with fewer questions.

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Your Roadmap
learn.description: Get a personalized study plan based on your target exam and current skill level. Lessons are structured concept-by-concept, so nothing is skipped or repeated.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: AI-Guided Problems
practice.description: Work through problems with an AI coach that asks guiding questions instead of just giving answers. Tricky questions help reveal hidden misunderstandings.

review.title: Review
review.subtitle: Video & Analysis
review.description: When you make repeated mistakes, the AI creates personalized video explanations. Your data is analyzed to predict scores and plan what to study next.

test.title: Test
test.subtitle: Exam Simulation
test.description: Take realistic mock exams that mirror the format and timing of your target test. Get instant grading with detailed analytics to close every gap.

howItWorks.loopText: This cycle repeats — each round gets you closer to your target score

curriculum.label: Supported Exams
curriculum.title: One Platform, Every Major Exam
curriculum.subtitle: Math problems may look different across exams, but the skills you need are universal. Mathiter helps you master them all from a single platform.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Less Than One Tutoring Session
pricing.subtitle: A full month of AI-powered learning for less than the cost of a single hour with a private tutor.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Full access to all AI features

team.label: Team Vision
team.title: Make math progress predictable.
team.subtitle: Most students don't struggle because they're "bad at math." They struggle because they don't have a clear path.
team.mission: Mathiter exists to turn confusion into a roadmap — so students always know what to do next, and why.
team.vision: We combine a globally structured math curriculum with the intensive exam-prep know-how of Korea's education system — building deep conceptual understanding and real problem-solving skills that translate directly into higher test scores.

direction.title: Direction beats effort.
direction.description: The right sequence matters more than "doing more."

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: You always know your next best step.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.description: Progress feels like a game — and becomes a habit.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: Practice matches the test, so scores follow.

team.tagline: Know what to study next — today.

cta.title: Ready to Improve Your Math Score?
cta.description: Join students from international schools who are already learning smarter with their personal AI math tutor.

footer.brandDescription: AI-powered math learning platform for international school students. Math + Iter (Latin: path) — guiding your journey to your target score.
